lines.speaker: Captain Magoro
lines.text: Hello! What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Captain Magoro
lines.text: This is the port of Land's End!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me about the local area?

lines.speaker: Captain Magoro
lines.text: Certainly. We're on the southern edge of the Kingdom of Great Kourend.

lines.speaker: Captain Magoro
lines.text: The kingdom is made up of five main cities. You'll find Shayzien and Lovakengj to the north, and the remaining cities to the north east.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to travel to Port Piscarilius, please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to travel to Port Sarim, please.

lines.speaker: Captain Magoro
lines.text: As you wish, I hope you don't get seasick, it is a long voyage.
